findings.issue: Blocker #15 (Open Badges 3.0 VC compliance) status is false. Partial implementation exists in `packages/badge_issuer/open_badges_3_0_` but lacks DID issuer, cryptographic proofs, revocation endpoint.
findings.recommended_fix: Complete Open Badges 3.0 VC compliance with full cryptographic signing, DID-based issuer identity, and revocation registry integration.

findings.issue: Blocker #16 (MIRT upgrade) status is false. System still uses 8 independent 3PL models; no multidimensional IRT integration.
findings.recommended_fix: Implement MIRT engine with unified latent trait model across 8 competencies, replacing standalone 3PL instances.

findings.issue: Unmitigated launch blocker: no rollback plan for database schema changes.
findings.recommended_fix: Implement versioned schema migrations with automated rollback scripts and pre-deployment impact analysis.

whistleblower_flag: P0 launch blockers remain unaddressed despite claimed readiness
